spec.name: A Bath House
spec.description: This was once the bath house for the commoners of the city. Hot steamy water still wells up from a hole in the floor. Obviously there is a hot spring located under the city (making the decision to put a city here seem much more reasonable). Closer inspection of the water yields a dead body floating around in it, skin melted away from months of floating in there. The west wall has collapsed revealing another collapsed house.

west.description: The wall has collapsed on the adjoining house, creating a new opening in it.
